warps.notes: Exit — left door back to Route 39
Exit — right door back to Route 39 (same warp target)

tile_layout.notes: Small barn interior. Two Twin NPC children (N) stand at (2,2) and (4,2), flanking Moomoo the Miltank (A) at center (3,2). The Miltank sprite uses SPRITE_TAUROS. Two exit door tiles at bottom row (3,7) and (4,7) both warp back to Route 39. There is no furniture or items visible in this room — its entire purpose is the Moomoo healing interaction.

npcs.name: Twin (left)

dialogue.before_heal: MOOMOO is sick… She needs lots of BERRIES.

npcs.notes: After interaction, turns to face right (turnobject RIGHT). State conditional on EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO.

npcs.name: Twin (right)

dialogue.before_heal: MOOMOO is sick… She needs lots of BERRIES.

npcs.notes: After interaction, turns to face left (turnobject LEFT). State conditional on EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO.

npcs.name: Moomoo (Miltank)
npcs.notes: Central quest NPC. Plays weak Miltank cry when sick. Berry-feeding interaction tracked by wMooMooBerries counter. Milestones at 3, 5, 7 Berries. At 7 Berries: MUSIC_HEAL plays, EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO is set, Moomoo recovers fully. After healing, gives happy Miltank cry. Full dialogue state machine below.

berry_feeding_milestones.dialogue: PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
PLAYER gave a BERRY to MILTANK.
berry_feeding_milestones.special: Plays MUSIC_HEAL, sets EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO, Moomoo fully recovers

post_farmer_talk_prompts: YES: takes one Berry from bag
NO: PLAYER wouldn't give a BERRY. MILTANK looks sad.

events.description: Feed Moomoo Berries one at a time. Tracker wMooMooBerries counts total Berries given. EVENT_TALKED_TO_FARMER_ABOUT_MOOMOO must be set (from Farmhouse conversation) before Berry-giving prompt appears. At 7 total Berries, EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO fires and Moomoo is fully healed. This unlocks Moomoo Milk for sale in the Farmhouse and TM13 Snore as a gift.

notes: The Barn is the core location of the Moomoo Farm sidequest. It is a 4x4 block (8x8 tile) building in the northwestern corner of Route 39. Two Twin NPC children flank Moomoo, a sick Miltank. The player must first speak to the Dairy Farmer in the adjacent Farmhouse to set EVENT_TALKED_TO_FARMER_ABOUT_MOOMOO, then return here and feed Moomoo 7 Berries across multiple visits. Memory variable wMooMooBerries tracks progress. Completing the quest sets EVENT_HEALED_MOOMOO globally, enabling Moomoo Milk purchase (500 per bottle) and TM13 Snore reward from the farmhouse wife.
